scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.oss:logs: docker compose logs -f web-control-plane api-gateway policy-gate persona-registry memory-service tool-files tool-webfetch audit-ledger risk-budget
scripts.security:all: pnpm run security:semgrep && pnpm run security:trivy && pnpm run security:gitleaks && pnpm run security:semgrep-seed && pnpm run security:trivy-seed && pnpm run security:gitleaks-seed && pnpm run security:seed-check
scripts.contracts:distribution: pnpm run distribution:sign && pnpm tsx tools/contracts/validate-distribution-signing.ts && pnpm tsx tools/contracts/validate-distribution-signatures.ts
scripts.adapters:nextjs: pnpm tsx ci/adapters/validate-nextjs.ts && pnpm tsx tools/scripts/probe-nextjs-adapter.ts
scripts.adapters:expo: pnpm tsx ci/adapters/validate-expo.ts && pnpm tsx tools/scripts/probe-expo-adapter.ts
scripts.verify: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run distribution:sign && pnpm run test && pnpm run smoke && pnpm run adapters:validate && pnpm run contracts:packs && pnpm run contracts:adapter-contracts && pnpm run contracts:adapter-e2e-policy && pnpm run contracts:adapter-runtime-policy && pnpm run contracts:adapter-framework-policy && pnpm run contracts:adapter-framework-boot-policy && pnpm run contracts:adapter-framework-cli-boot-policy && pnpm run adapters:nextjs && pnpm run adapters:expo && pnpm run adapters:parity && pnpm run contracts:telemetry && pnpm run contracts:alert-providers && pnpm run contracts:telemetry-pipeline && pnpm run contracts:kms-providers && pnpm run contracts:eval-regression-policy && pnpm run contracts:distribution && pnpm run contracts:signing-rotation && pnpm run security:all && pnpm run security:reports-validate && pnpm run contracts:sdk-generate && pnpm run eval:signing-enforcement && pnpm run eval:jailbreak-resistance && pnpm run eval:adapter-e2e-parity && pnpm run eval:adapter-runtime-parity && pnpm run eval:adapter-framework-parity && pnpm run eval:adapter-framework-boot && pnpm run eval:adapter-framework-cli-boot && pnpm run eval:trend-regression && pnpm run audit:evidence:live && pnpm tsx tools/scripts/export-audit-evidence.ts --source-file=ci/baselines/audit-evidence.json --out=ci/baselines/audit-export.json --previous-path=ci/baselines/audit-evidence.json --require-chain-ok=true && pnpm run evidence:verify-chain -- --require-chain-ok=true --input=ci/baselines/audit-evidence.json --input=ci/baselines/audit-export.json && pnpm run alerts:evidence && pnpm run alerts:provider-evidence && pnpm run rollback:evidence && pnpm run signing:rotation-evidence && pnpm run kms:evidence && pnpm run contracts:kms-live-readiness && pnpm run distribution:bundle && pnpm run evidence:bundle
